title: Quick Processing
description: OCR uploaded documents, edit markdown, then send approved content to the knowledge base.
sentToKb: OCR markdown sent to Knowledge Base successfully.
sendError: Failed to send OCR to KB.
reusedResult: Reused existing OCR result for this document.
chunkOverlapError: Chunk overlap must be smaller than chunk size.
reviewMarkdownHint: Review markdown before sending to KB.
noJobsHint: Upload a document to start the OCR pipeline.
uploadDescription: Convert PDF or images into editable markdown before feeding into the knowledge base.
selectFileError: Please select a PDF or image file.
previewDescription: Review and edit markdown before creating a knowledge chunk.
alreadySentToKb: This OCR job has already been sent to the knowledge base.
saveBeforeSend: Save markdown changes before sending to KB.
